Caso já possua uma planilha pronta (Exce: If you already have a spreadsheet (Excel .xlsx or CSV), upload it here. If not, you can manually add data below.
Inserção manual de dados. Cada inserção: Manual data entry. Each entry will be added as a new row in the table aside.
Adicione uma nova linha à planilha carre: Add a new row to the loaded spreadsheet.
Nome do produto (ex: Soja, Milho). O sis: Product name (e.g., Soy, Corn). The system will automatically adjust case and suggest registered products.
Total weight of the load in kilograms.
Selecione a cidade de origem/destino. Di: Select the origin/destination city. Type to filter options.
Coordenada de latitude. Preenchida autom: Latitude coordinate. Automatically filled when selecting the city.
Coordenada de longitude. Preenchida auto: Longitude coordinate. Automatically filled when selecting the city.
Faça o download da base atualmente em us: Download the currently used base to your machine.
Arquivo preenchido com todos os dados da: File filled with all table data in .xlsx format
Salvar a planilha para usos futuros. Não: Save the spreadsheet for future use. Exporting is not necessary to continue using features in this session.
Baixe a planilha com os novos dados adic: Download the spreadsheet with newly added data.
Atenção: Esta ação irá sobrescrever a ba: Warning: This action will irreversibly overwrite the original database. The new submitted base will be used for all future applications. Are you sure you want to continue?
Essa função guardará a nova versão que s: This function will save the new version that will be used for future applications, replacing the automatically loaded base.
Esta base possui mais de 1000 armazéns e: This base has over 1000 warehouses, which may cause performance slowdowns during use.
Selecione qual base de armazéns deseja u: Select which warehouse database to use for the optimization model.
Atenção: Para as unidades em que a base: Warning: For units where the database does not provide a reception capacity value, it will be automatically set to 0.
Atenção: Você precisará informar o estoq: Warning: You will need to manually input the initial stock for each storage unit in the table, as the used database does not provide this information.
Carregue o arquivo CSV na área que apare: Upload the CSV file in the area that will appear after closing this window.
Carregue o arquivo na área que aparecerá: Upload the file in the area that will appear after closing this window.
No final da página de resultados, export: At the bottom of the results page, export or save the table as a CSV file.
O arquivo deve conter as seguintes colun: The file must contain the following columns (order does not matter, and casing/accents are tolerated):
O sistema buscará automaticamente as inf: The system will automatically fetch the latest information from the official Conab website and replace the current base.
Siga os passos abaixo para atualizar a b: Follow the steps below to update the warehouse database:
Você pode enviar a sua própria base de a: You can upload your own warehouse database by uploading a .csv or .xlsx file.
Você também pode baixar um arquivo de ex: You can also download an example file with the expected format and edit it before uploading.
Como Atualizar a Base (Armazéns Cadastra: How to Update the Base (Registered Warehouses)
Como Atualizar a Base (Armazéns Credenci: How to Update the Base (Accredited Warehouses)
Como Enviar uma Base Personalizada: How to Upload a Custom Base
Para atualizar a base de Armazéns Cadast: To update the SICARM Registered Warehouses database, simply close this pop-up and click the 'Download Data from Conab' button.
Preencha o código de segurança e clique: Fill in the security code and click 'Consultar'.
O sistema consultará automaticamente a b: The system will automatically consult the SICARM database to fill the 'Reception Capacity' column.
Os seguintes CDAs do seu arquivo não tiv: The following CDAs in your file did not have their 'Reception Capacity' found in the updated SICARM (Conab) database, and were therefore set to 0:
Selecione quais tipos de armazém podem a: Select which warehouse types can store each product. Click the cell to check (☑) or uncheck (☐).
Você precisa adicionar produtos na aba ': You need to add products in the 'Supply' tab and load the base in the 'Warehouses' tab before proceeding.
Você precisa adicionar pelo menos um pro: You need to add at least one product in the 'Supply' tab before proceeding.
Você precisa carregar a base de dados na: You need to load the database in the 'Warehouses' tab before proceeding.
Valores para armazenamento de cada produ: Storage values for each product. The system will search for the exact product name (ignoring accents and case). If not found, it will use the 'Outros' (Others) row tariff. The 'Outros' row is mandatory and will be automatically created with a value of 50 if it doesn't exist in a new file. Table updates will be saved automatically.
Valores de frete por tonelada e km para: Freight values per ton and km for each state. Table updates will be saved automatically.
Calcula a distância rodoviária real entr: Calculates the real road distance between each origin city (Supply) and each warehouse (Warehouses).
Clique no botão abaixo para iniciar o cá: Click the button below to start the calculation. This may take a few seconds depending on the amount of data.
Clique em uma célula da tabela para visu: Click on a table cell to visualize the route on the map below.
Clique na tabela acima para visualizar a: Click on the table above to visualize the desired route. Only one route can be viewed at a time. In cases where the route is displayed as a red straight line, it indicates the real route could not be calculated, possibly because the point is outside Brazil or in an isolated area with no roads within a 50 km radius. In these cases, the distance displayed in the table is the geodesic distance (straight line) between the points, not the actual road distance.
Dados de entrada ou armazéns não encontr: Input data or warehouses not found. Check the previous tabs.
As tabelas de entrada ou armazéns estão: The input or warehouse tables are empty.
Colunas de Latitude/Longitude ausentes n: Latitude/Longitude columns missing in the input.
Não foi possível identificar coordenadas: Could not identify coordinates or Municipality/State columns in the warehouses.
Nenhum armazém com coordenadas válidas e: No warehouse with valid coordinates found.
